title: Little Einsteins: Our Big Huge Adventure
original_title: Little Einsteins: Our Big Huge Adventure
overview: This educational program for children invites the viewer to interact with the characters on screen through singing, clapping, and dancing. Animated hosts Leo, June, Quincy, Annie, and Rocket explore a Mexican butterfly garden, Niagara Falls, and an Oklahoman cave.
